---
name: Awareness primitive proposal
about: Propose a new way for My Alicia to perceive something about her user
title: "[PRIMITIVE] "
labels: awareness-primitive, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What this primitive perceives

What slice of life does this skill notice? Be concrete: "patterns in book completions" beats "reading habits".

## Why it matters

What kind of user would benefit from this perception? What does it unlock for them?

## Which loop does it surface in

- [ ] Listen — reacts to messages in real time
- [ ] Notice — runs on event triggers (ends of sessions, captures, etc.)
- [ ] Know — runs on schedule (daily / weekly / monthly)
- [ ] More than one — explain how

## What it reads

Where does it pull data from? Some examples:

- Vault notes (which folders / patterns)
- Memory files (`MEMORY.md`, `preferences.md`, etc.)
- Conversation history
- External sources (web search, RSS, calendar — be specific)

## What it produces

What does the primitive output? Some examples:

- A new note in `Alicia/Wisdom/`
- A proactive message
- An update to memory / archetype
- A flag that another skill picks up

## Sketch (optional)

If you've prototyped it, paste a snippet. Otherwise describe the shape.

## Anything else

Related primitives, prior art, naming ideas.
